self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Oppidan Ambush (R5): while in the party but off-field, DMG +4% per second, up to +40% after 10s; once back on-field for more than 4s, the buff decays 8%/s. Modeled at the +40% max-stack value (typical for burst-then-swap rotations) since off-field/on-field timing isn't tracked by the evaluator; real uptime during long on-field windows will be lower.
